---
title: "Exercises"
---

Templates for every hands-on session. **Days 1–5** use plain `.R`
scripts; **Day 6** uses Quarto (`.qmd`) because reproducible documents
are the topic of that session. Full submission workflow in
[`exercises/README.md`](README.md).

| Day | Session | Type | Template |
|:---:|---|---|---|
| 1 | Git & GitHub · Data in R | Guided | [`day1/exercise-template.R`](day1/exercise-template.R) |
| 2 | Data wrangling | Guided | [`day2/exercise-template.R`](day2/exercise-template.R) |
| 3 | Basic statistics | Graded | [`day3/exercise-template.R`](day3/exercise-template.R) |
| 4 | One-variable visualisation | Graded | [`day4/exercise-template.R`](day4/exercise-template.R) |
| 5 | Multi-variable visualisation | Graded | [`day5/exercise-template.R`](day5/exercise-template.R) |
| 6 | Reproducible documents | Final submission | [`day6/exercise-template.qmd`](day6/exercise-template.qmd) |
